200# return «
choose a throne:

Event: Winter Festival 2025
Event Date: 01/12/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: E65
Seal of Decay

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, for 3 sec., the unit casts exhaustion on 2 random enemy units every second. Exhausted enemy units take physical damage equal to 90% / 91% / 92% / 93% / 95% / 97% / 100% of the attack of the engraving's owner every second. While the effect is active, their attack speed and the damage they deal are reduced by 4% / 5% / 6% / 7% / 8% / 9% / 10%. The exhaustion lasts 3 sec. Stacks up to 3 times.

Enhancement: 2
12000 Dodge from the gems
Once in a while, every second for 4 sec., the unit starts reducing the physical and magic armor of 3 random enemy units by 5% / 6% / 7% / 8% / 10% / 12% / 15% for 4 sec.; stacks up to 4 times. Exhaustion is also applied to the targets. Exhausted enemy unit takes physical damage equal to 115% / 116% / 117% / 118% / 120% / 122% / 125% of the attack of the engraving's owner every second. While the effect is active, their attack speed and the damage they deal are reduced by 6% / 7% / 8% / 9% / 10% / 12% / 15%. The exhaustion lasts 4 sec. Stacks up to 4 times.

Enhancement: 3
25000 Dodge from the gems
Once in a while, every second for 5 sec., the unit starts reducing the physical and magic armor of 4 random enemy units by 11% / 12% / 13% / 14% / 15% / 17% / 20% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times. Exhaustion is also applied to the targets. Exhausted enemy unit takes physical damage equal to 140% / 141% / 142% / 143% / 145% / 147% / 150% of the attack of the engraving's owner every second. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects. While the effect is active, their attack speed and the damage they deal are reduced by 10% / 11% / 12% / 13% / 15% / 17% / 20%. The exhaustion lasts 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times.

Requirements:

Event date: 01/12/2025

Sage bot code: E65

First trigger: 5 sec

Cooldown: 9 secs
